notes: Library card sections completed for parent assignment: reading, vocabulary, journals, writing, questions, informational text, and assessments.
Created from local 6th grade source folder audit.
Local source folder includes 24-chapter adapted text, vocabulary companion, comprehension questions, and plain-text exports.

book.title: The Swiss Family Robinson
book.description: Local source folder includes 24-chapter adapted text, vocabulary companion, comprehension questions, and plain-text exports.

weeks.title: Week 19: The Swiss Family Robinson Part 1 (Days 91-95)
vocabulary: Survival: define, use in context, and connect to the week's reading
text evidence: quote accurately and explain the quotation
academic discussion: build on another reader's idea
journal: What does this section reveal about Survival? Use evidence from the reading.
Which choice, challenge, or discovery matters most this week? Explain your thinking.
writing: Write an evidence paragraph explaining a character decision.
Revise one answer by adding stronger text evidence and a clearer explanation.
questions: What is the central conflict or challenge in this section?
How does the setting shape what the characters can or cannot do?
Which quotation best supports your understanding of a character?
How is the author building theme, suspense, humor, or wonder?
assessment: Weekly vocabulary check and comprehension response.
Review day: discuss questions, revise writing, and prepare for the next section.
